design_impact_correction_note: Plan bin scaffolded design_impact=none from frame status.json, but frame design-intent.json was corrected to major after frame ran. Plan-stage author has corrected this matrix to match the actual framing decision.

benchmark.reason: Performance success criteria: rewrite initiates <200ms on warm local; consistency check on 50k-word manuscript <60s local / <30s cloud; idle-cost regression <5% vs upstream baseline.

design_review.reason: Frame design-intent flagged major design impact with 8 affected surfaces. Real design contract required before /handoff.

browse.reason: Desktop PyQt6 app; no browser-facing surfaces.

benchmark.reason: Performance success criteria are explicit and measurable; benchmark evidence should attach at QA.

cso.reason: Cloud API key handling, single-egress network module, and privacy-gating contract benefit from a security review pass before ship.

connect_chrome.reason: Desktop PyQt6 app; no browser session needed.

setup_browser_cookies.reason: Desktop PyQt6 app; no browser session needed.

criteria.description: Selection of zero characters disables the Rewrite menu items.
Review pane reachable and operable by keyboard alone.
Rejecting a proposal leaves document, cursor, undo stack, scroll unchanged.
Token estimate within 20% of actual on 95% of cloud calls.
With AI off, Rewrite menu items are hidden, not greyed.
On bundled sample project at default strictness, zero false positives.
>=70% recall, <=20% FPR on test corpus of 3 novels with 30 seeded errors.
Every model output validates against JSON schema before display; malformed surfaces an error.
Cancelling a check mid-run leaves document and markers untouched.
60-second scripted session with AI off produces zero outbound TCP/UDP traffic.
CI fails if any module imports httpx or requests outside novelwriter/ai/network.py.
Cloud API keys never written to disk in plaintext; verified via grep + integration test.
Every provider passes the same contract test suite.
Both AI features work with at least one local and one cloud provider.
5 plotters with no prior novelWriter exposure complete the new-user task (open project, draft first scene, run consistency check) in <=8 minutes.
Open upstream project in fork, save, reopen in upstream — diff is zero.

resolved_gaps.note: Design contract produced via /design-consultation. DESIGN.md authored at repo root; CLAUDE.md updated to require reading it before UI work.
